hero.headline: AI transformation for finance teams.
hero.headlineAccent: By experts who know the processes from the inside.
hero.subheadline: We help CFOs and finance leaders implement AI that actually works – not just pay for licenses.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: From AI strategy to hands-on implementation in your finance team

items.title: AI Readiness for Finance
items.description: We assess where your team is ready and where the biggest opportunities for improvement lie.
items.detail: We conduct a comprehensive assessment of your finance department – from processes and tools to people readiness. The result is a clear opportunity map with concrete recommendations for where AI will bring the most value.

items.title: AI Use Case Identification
items.description: Concrete use cases for accounting, tax, controlling and reporting.
items.detail: We don't work with abstract AI possibilities – we find concrete use cases for your actual processes. The result is a prioritized list with ROI estimates and implementation complexity for each case.

items.title: AI Strategy Design
items.description: A structured AI implementation plan tailored to your finance department's processes.
items.detail: We create an AI transformation roadmap tailored to your finance department – with a clear sequence of steps, KPIs, milestones and a way to measure success.

items.title: AI Adoption & Change Management
items.description: We guide your team through the change – from skeptics to active AI users.
items.detail: The biggest barrier to AI isn't tools, it's people. We help with change management, team education and building a culture where AI is a helper, not a threat.

items.title: Tool Selection & Implementation
items.description: We select and deploy the right AI tools for your specific context and needs.
items.detail: We navigate the crowded AI tools market. We help you choose what truly fits – and we don't stop at selection, but guide you through implementation and onboarding too.

meta.title: Next Change AI – AI Transformation for Finance Teams

servicesPage.title: What we do for you
servicesPage.subtitle: Every company is different. That's why we always start by understanding your specific context.

aboutPage.title: By experts who know the processes from the inside
aboutPage.subtitle: We're not consultants who brought AI from the outside. We've worked inside finance departments ourselves and know how things really work.

founder1.name: Lucie Fojtová
founder1.bio:
I help finance teams implement AI in a way that genuinely changes how they work.

I know consulting from Big4. I know what world-class analysis and strategic recommendations look like. I've also seen how that work often stops the moment it hits internal reality – the part where the consultant no longer has reach.

I know the other side too. Ten years as an internal finance manager – where recommendations have to survive company politics, legacy systems, messy data and unclear ownership. Where change depends on people who already have their hands full with day-to-day operations.

That's where projects succeed – or fail. And that's exactly where AI transformation is happening today. Just faster and more visibly.

That's why I focus on making sure AI doesn't stay just a strategy or a pilot, but actually changes the way finance teams work.

founder2.name: Renáta Kuchařová
founder2.bio:
I help finance teams use data and AI to manage finances better.

My experience combines audit practice at Big4 with more than ten years working in finance teams at a large technology company. I led a GL team and later focused on data analysis and financial data. This gives me a solid understanding of how finance actually works – from accounting processes to reporting and data work.

Today I help organisations leverage AI and analytics so that finance works more efficiently and has better foundations for decision-making.

whyUs.title: Why Next Change AI?
items: We both have real experience from finance departments – not just theory
We understand what's possible and what's marketing
We don't sell tools – we sell results
We speak the language of finance, not IT

contactPage.title: Let's talk
contactPage.subtitle: Write to us or find us on LinkedIn. We'd love to talk about where AI can help your finance team.
